rag_rules: AGREE assumptions and guarantees for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use visible feature names and legal identifiers when defining assumptions and guarantees
Place output range guarantees inside annex agree only when concrete bounds or named constants are provided
Ensure helper declarations match the actual types of expressions used in contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid AADL scope rules: component types for port contracts, implementations for bindings
Define boolean helper variables using pattern: eq variable_name : bool = expression
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts without valid variables or outputs
Do not place implementation-level assumptions in component type scopes
